title: About CAPXEL | CAPXEL
content: CAPXEL — AI-Native Consumer IntelligenceThe 90% You Can't SeeOnly 10% of an iceberg is visible. The other 90% is what gives it the power to change everything. Data works the same way.Talk to Our TeamExplore ProductsThe iceberg is real: most signal is hidden beneath the surface.Who We AreAn AI-driven data intelligence companyCAPXEL is fundamentally an AI-driven data intelligence company and white-glove data consultancy. We don't do marketing — we empower the teams who do.Founded by Nick Dunev (Founder) and Dominick Luna (Co-Founder).Our MissionTo empower businesses with the most expansive, accurate, and secure consumer intelligence available anywhere.Our EdgeCAPXEL is built to reveal what other systems can't see.Deepest Data260M+ US identities and 500+ data points per profile — built for precision marketing intelligence.AI-NativeDesigned for the agentic era: structured intelligence, automated resolution, and scalable enrichment.LLM-LD AuthorsWe wrote the standard for how AI discovers businesses — a machine-readable layer agents can trust.Security-FirstAES-256 encryption and blockchain-based transfers. Security is infrastructure, not an add-on.The IcebergMost signal is hidden beneath the surfaceThe visible layer — clicks, sessions, and conversions — is only 10% of what drives growth. The other 90% is identity, behavior, intent, and context. We built CAPXEL to reveal it.Iceberg translationCAPXEL connects the hidden layer (identity + intent + behavior) to the visible layer (your marketing and sales execution). The result is intelligence your team can act on — without guessing.Our VisionHuman outcomes — powered by AI and deep dataA future where businesses leverage AI and deep consumer data to improve customer relationships and commerce — not in a way that feels robotic, but human.CAPXELSee what we can reveal for youStart with a conversation — we'll map the hidden signal in your market to the products that drive impact.Talk to Our TeamExplore ASORelated products: SPYBOX · INSPEX · Buyer Ambition Data · LANDMARX
